description: The file 'page.tsx' is a React component for a student dashboard page in a Next.js application. It renders various sections such as courses, assignments, grades, announcements, and role-based tools, fetching data asynchronously and displaying it with UI components.

methods.name: formatDate
methods.description: Formats an ISO string into a short, readable date format.

methods.name: AssignmentRow
methods.description: Component rendering a row for an assignment, displaying title, due date, course code, and status badge.

methods.name: AnnouncementRow
methods.description: Component rendering a single announcement with title, body, author, and publish date.

methods.name: GradeRow
methods.description: Component rendering grade details including course code, title, and percentage with a progress bar.
